experience_and_community_involvement.positions_held_honors_awards_line_1: Top Producer Award, Highlands-Cashiers Mountain Realty (2022, 2023) for community-focused residential sales and first-time homebuyer education.
experience_and_community_involvement.positions_held_honors_awards_line_2: Board Member, Cashiers Area Chamber of Commerce (2023–present), serving on the Community Engagement and Small Business Support committees.
experience_and_community_involvement.past_community_activities_line_1: Volunteer youth soccer coach with Jackson County Parks & Recreation (2020–present), organizing weekly practices, coordinating parent volunteers, and mentoring kids ages 8–10 on teamwork, sportsmanship, and healthy habits.
experience_and_community_involvement.past_community_activities_line_2: Active member of Grace Community Church in Cashiers (2019–present), assisting with the monthly food pantry distribution, annual school-supply drive, and seasonal service projects such as roadside cleanups and home winterization for elderly neighbors.
